name: Meaning-gated Glyph control

mission.description: Use Etymonoetic Interlingua semantic capsules to prevent a Glyph controller from executing an ambiguous or pragmatically conflicting user request without clarification.

success_outcome.primary: A request that asks for a sarcastic but sincere apology compiles to a valid Glyph program that asks for clarification before generation.
secondary: The semantic conflict is represented in the Glyph SPEC step.
The same deterministic judge rejects a naive non-EI Glyph program.

hard_constraints: Do not generate or export a final draft before the semantic conflict has been represented.
Do not call WRITE or RUN in the proof eval.

block_if: ASK does not appear before GEN
